message:
perf(runtime): migrate ThreeLaneWorker lock sites from std RwLock to parking_lot

Update three remaining if-let-Ok lock patterns in ThreeLaneWorker:
- cancel_waker setup in task dispatch: collapse if-let-Ok(write) to
  direct write()
- cancel check during task completion: collapse if-let-Ok(read) into
  direct read(), flattening nested cancel_requested+cancel_reason check
- cancel acknowledgement reset: collapse if-let-Ok(write) to direct
  write()

These were the last std RwLock error-path sites in the scheduler.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
